   "reasoning": "I'm putting transparency first - auditors don't like surprises, and we've got a trust score to rebuild. Attendance mandates have audit-friendly metrics, and those kids who lost parents need all the structure we can give them. I'm worried about resource allocation without a clear plan, so resource reallocation is just a gentle nudge. As for 'emotional fragility', that's not our department; someone else can handle the free-form counseling programs.",
